decision-tree.root-question: Are ≥2 calibrating raters available AND ≥3 named behaviour anchors per domain accessible from the last 90 days?

branch.conclusion: Run the full 1-5 rubric across all 8 PMBoK domains. Each score MUST carry an anchor quote and an evidence link.
Score only the domains with sufficient anchors; mark anchor-light domains as `not_assessed: insufficient_evidence`.
Defer the rubric. Find a calibrating rater first; opinion-tracking destroys the operating value.
